parameters.subject: =🔴 CRITICAL: Google Drive Connection Failed - {{ $json.clientName }}
parameters.message:
=

Google Drive Connection Failure

Client: {{ $json.clientName }}

Error Type: {{ $json.errorType }}

Timestamp: {{ $json.errorTimestamp }}

Error Message:

{{ $json.errorMessage }}

Action Required:

  • Check if Google Drive credentials need to be re-authorized
  • Verify OAuth token hasn't expired
  • Check Google Drive API quotas and limits
  • Ensure the service account has proper permissions

The workflow will continue attempting to connect on the next schedule cycle.
